breakdown: This PR adds XP progress tracking (current_xp, next_level_xp) to the rewards box visibility logic. The change is a simple but targeted boolean condition addition to show the rewards box when a player has XP progress toward the next level. Type safety is weak—there's no validation that current_xp/next_level_xp are numeric before comparison, and the docstring notes 'absent fields' but doesn't handle them defensively. The architecture is reasonable with business logic in world_logic.py and tests in testing_mcp/. Test coverage exists but focuses on the refactored function names rather than explicit tests for the new XP progress condition.
key_changes: Added visibility condition `or (current_xp > 0 and next_level_xp > 0)` in normalize_rewards_box_for_ui()
Updated docstring to document new XP progress tracking visibility rules
Renamed ensure_level_up_rewards_pending to _check_and_set_level_up_pending in comments and test files
Refactored test imports to use session_header_utils module instead of world_logic module
Removed world_logic_module fixture parameter from several test functions
